summary.weather: Seoul (Sunday, March 29 morning: Mostly cloudy, 9°C, light breeze)
summary.market: Markets closed. Focus remains on Q1 semiconductor demand; AMZN navigating $200B AI infrastructure investment scrutiny; INTC showing volatility following Core Ultra Series 3 launch and CrowdStrike security partnership.
